code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./Programs.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Programs=()=>{const programs=[{title:'STRENGTH TRAINING',description:'Build muscle and increase strength',icon:'💪'},{title:'WEIGHT LOSS',description:'Achieve your weight loss goals',icon:'🔥'},{title:'PERSONAL TRAINING',description:'One-on-one coaching',icon:'👥'},{title:'CROSSFIT',description:'High-intensity functional training',icon:'⚡'},{title:'HIIT',description:'Quick, intense workouts',icon:'⏱️'},{title:'YOGA',description:'Improve flexibility and balance',icon:'🧘'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"programs-section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title",children:"OUR PROGRAMS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"section-subtitle",children:"Choose from a variety of programs"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"programs-grid",children:programs.map((program,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"program-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"program-icon",children:program.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:program.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:program.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/booking",className:"program-btn",children:"LEARN MORE"})]},index))})]})});};export default Programs;
